mapper.sql: id, paper_name, subject_id, generate_type, total_score, duration_minutes, creator_id, description, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.select: select from paper where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
mapper.insert: insert into paper(paper_name, subject_id, generate_type, total_score, duration_minutes, creator_id, description, create_time, update_time, deleted) values (#{paperName}, #{subjectId}, #{generateType}, #{totalScore}, #{durationMinutes}, #{creatorId}, #{description}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleted})
mapper.update: update paper set paper_name = #{paperName}, subject_id = #{subjectId}, generate_type = #{generateType}, total_score = #{totalScore}, duration_minutes = #{durationMinutes}, creator_id = #{creatorId}, description = #{description}, update_time = #{updateTime} where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
update paper set deleted = 1, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
